'''Shoon-mi Esh''', crèche-brother to [[Niiriit Esh]], was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] living in the dark underbelly of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]], the former capital of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Shoon-mi was part of one of the many [[Shamed Ones]] who revered the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as the future saviors of [[Yuuzhan Vong|his people]]. However, he did not flee to the depths of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]], so his sister [[Niiriit Esh]] refused to acknowledge his existence.

Shoon-mi was dedicated to the continued survival of his group, particularly Niiriit. However, the Shamed Ones were discovered by a hunting party of [[Warrior caste|warriors]], and only a few escaped the raid—[[Kunra]] and the being who came to be known as [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]], but was in reality the former [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|executor]] [[Nom Anor]].

Nom Anor, under the guise of the enigmatic prophet Yu'shaa, began to unite the Shamed Ones against their common enemy, the higher castes. Though Yu'shaa's following grew steadily, Shoon-mi began to doubt the Prophet's dedication to the message. He felt that Yu'shaa would only lead the Shamed from one form of [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] to another.

Shoon-mi and a small band of Shamed Ones attempted to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Yu'shaa while he slept. Under an [[ooglith masquer]], Shoon-mi planned to take over the role of the Prophet. While Shoon-mi pressed [[coufee]] against Yu'shaa's throat threaten to kill him while talking to him, Yu'shaa'a assistant [[Kunra]] appeared on the scene and stabbed Shoon-mi himself, saving Yu'shaa's life. Yu'shaa strangled the remaining life out of the incapacitated Shamed One.
